channel.title: Bi on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Bi on Pi Stack

item.title: Cube.js vs Rill vs Apache Kylin: Self-Hosted Semantic Layer Guide 2026
item.description: A semantic layer sits between your raw data sources and your BI dashboards, providing a unified, governed definition of metrics, dimensions, and relationships. Instead of duplicating business logic across every dashboard tool, you define it once in the semantic layer and consume it everywhere — via SQL, REST APIs, GraphQL, or native BI connectors.
